title: Client Web Displays
body:
Client Web Displays

## Features: - Client-side: you can use it on any server! - Rich window configuration - Spatial audio - Browser actions / YouTube media sync (if installed on host/server) ![https://i.postimg.cc/RhbSCjFM/ezgif-4f8a39c5ebba0f73.gif](https://i.postimg.cc/RhbSCjFM/ezgif-4f8a39c5ebba0f73.gif) --- ## Usage - to create window type `/cwd create ` command - aim to window and press **ALT** (by default) to enter in **edit window mode** - or press **ENTER** (by default) to enter in **input mode** to type something ### Buttons in edit mode: - `R` - reload page - `P` - pin window to player position - `O` - render window on top of world and entities - `L` - light window (ignore world's light) - `S` - spatial audio (by default its turn ON) - `I` - lock input mode ### Other usefull commands: - `/cwd url ` - change a URL of the display - `/cwd acces grant/revoke ` - give/take an acces to your display ## Compatibility render on-top of world and ignore light are not works with Iris shaders =(
